description:
A secure and efficient enterprise collaboration platform

Tencent Cloud Enterprise Drive is an enterprise-level office product that lets employees store and manage various business files in the cloud. It provides services such as file storage, permission management, online collaboration, and file collection and distribution, helping enterprises improve data management efficiency and maximize the value of data.
功能更新：
- Supports move/copy in searching results
- Client-Side caching sorting methods​
- Supports cross-space moving​
- ​Sync performance optimization​
功能修复：

- Fix issues
